channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bills might be better, but Chiefs are favored for a reason
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Chiefs are slight favorites to beat the Bills on Sunday and get a shot at winning an unprecedented third consecutive Super Bowl. But that doesn't mean Kansas City is the better team. “I agree with that,” CBS SportsLine handicapper Bruce Marshall said.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Welcome to the mobile age: NFL conference title games filled with dual-threat QBs
item.description: From Buffalo's Josh Allen facing Kansas City's Patrick Mahomes, to Philadelphia's Jalen Hurts going up against Washington's Jayden Daniels, the NFL conference championship games are abundant with dual-threat quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Ohio State coach Urban Meyer takes aim at 'idiots on social media' after Buckeyes win national title
item.description: Former Ohio State Buckeyes head coach Urban Meyer, who was in Atlanta on Monday to watch Ohio State win the national championship, came to the defense of current Buckeyes coach Ryan Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki wants to have a drink with writer who left him off Hall of Fame ballot
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — Ichiro Suzuki wants to raise a glass with the voter who chose not to check off his name on the Hall of Fame ballot.
item.dc:creator: ALEX RUBINSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meyer Shank Racing returns to Rolex 24 as 61 cars and 235 drivers prep for Daytona endurance race
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Meyer Shank Racing opened the 2022 season with a win at the Rolex 24 of Daytona and closed it by winning the IMSA Series championship.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lawsuit says ex-Yankee Mariano Rivera failed to protect a girl from sexual abuse at a church camp
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Yankees legend Mariano Rivera and his wife are accused in a lawsuit of failing to protect a young girl who was sexually abused by an older child during a summer camp trip sponsored by their church.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 2025 Heisman race: Our look at the dark horse candidates, from Oklahoma’s John Mateer to Utah’s Devon Dampier
item.description: The top of the board features LSU's Garrett Nussmeier and Texas' Arch Manning but Devon Dampier, who tran to Utah from New Mexico after a dazzling season, is undervalued as a long-shot candidate.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Rays' agreement for the Trop could extend beyond 2028 season
item.description: The Rays demand Tropicana Field be repaired and ready for opening day of the 2026 season. In response, leaders with the City of St. Petersburg say their agreement doesn't include a "deadline" for the repairs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU bounces back with 83-67 win over Colorado
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) - After losing four of its last five games, the BYU basketball team turned it on in the second half in route to an 83-67 win over Colorado Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers continue offseason dominance, sign All-Star reliever
item.description: As the Los Angeles Dodgers stormed toward the World Series last October, one weakness was consistently brought up for the Boys in Blue: relief pitching.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Once again, Travis Kelce has broken a record at Arrowhead Stadium after catching a pass from Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, Fox 5

item.title: Neff injured in Red Rocks win over Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team came away with an easy victory over Iowa State in its Big 12 Conference opener Friday night, but it came at a price.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC hosts first ever practice
item.description: It was a warm welcome as San Diego FC reported to training camp Sunday, Jan. 12 surrounded by season ticketholders and support groups, taking the practice pitch for the very first time on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC's youngest player having big impact
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Logan Cooley may only be 20 years old, but it is scary to think where the Utah Hockey Club would be without him this year. Cooley can't even drink legally, and he is second on the team in points with 12 goals and 25 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
